title: Badge
description: A label that shows the status of an object, emphasizes an element that requires attention, or helps categorize with other similar elements.

body.raw:
## Sizes

<Badge size="sm">Badge</Badge>
<Badge size="md">Badge</Badge>
<Badge size="lg">Badge</Badge>

## Variants

<Badge variant="amber-subtle">Badge</Badge>
<Badge variant="amber">Badge</Badge>
<Badge variant="blue-subtle">Badge</Badge>
<Badge variant="blue">Badge</Badge>
<Badge variant="gray-contrast">Badge</Badge>
<Badge variant="gray-subtle">Badge</Badge>
<Badge variant="gray">Badge</Badge>
<Badge variant="pink-subtle">Badge</Badge>
<Badge variant="pink">Badge</Badge>
<Badge variant="purple-subtle">Badge</Badge>
<Badge variant="purple">Badge</Badge>
<Badge variant="red-subtle">Badge</Badge>
<Badge variant="red">Badge</Badge>
<Badge variant="trial">Badge</Badge>
<Badge variant="turbo">Badge</Badge>
